allow: PowerShell($ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; $dest = "C:\\Users\\dcald\\Downloads\\eclipse-jee-2026-03-R-win32-x86_64.zip"; $url = "https://download.eclipse.org/technology/epp/downloads/release/2026-03/R/eclipse-jee-2026-03-R-win32-x86_64.zip"; Write-Output "Descargando Eclipse Enterprise \(~556 MB\)..."; $t0 = Get-Date; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $dest; if \(Test-Path $dest\) { $size = [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $dest\).Length/1MB,1\); Write-Output "DESCARGA COMPLETA: $size MB en $dest" } else { Write-Output "ERROR: no se descargo" })
